2604.13151.title: Exploration and Exploitation Errors Are Measurable for Language Model Agents
2604.13151.paper_summary: Language Model (LM) agents are increasingly used in complex open-ended decision-making tasks, from AI coding to physical AI. A core requirement in these settings is the ability to both explore the problem space and exploit acquired knowledge effectively. However, systematically distinguishing and quantifying exploration and exploitation from observed actions without access to the agent's internal policy remains challenging. To address this, we design controllable environments inspired by practical embodied AI scenarios. Each environment consists of a partially observable 2D grid map and an unknown task Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG). The map generation can be programmatically adjusted to emphasize exploration or exploitation difficulty. To enable policy-agnostic evaluation, we design a metric to quantify exploration and exploitation errors from agent's actions. We evaluate a variety of frontier LM agents and find that even state-of-the-art models struggle on our task, with different models exhibiting distinct failure modes. We further observe that reasoning models solve the task more effectively and show both exploration and exploitation can be significantly improved through minimal harness engineering. We release our code \href{https://github.com/jjj-madison/measurable-explore-exploit}{here}.
2604.13151.paper_summary_zh: 語言模型 (LM) 代理在複雜的開放式決策任務中越來越多地被使用，從 AI 編碼到物理 AI。這些環境中的一個核心要求是能夠有效地探索問題空間並利用獲得的知識。然而，系統性地區分和量化探索與利用，並從觀察到的行動中進行分析，而不接觸代理的內部政策，仍然是一個挑戰。為了解決這個問題，我們設計了受實際具身 AI 場景啟發的可控環境。每個環境由一個部分可觀察的 2D 網格地圖和一個未知的任務有向無環圖 (DAG) 組成。地圖生成可以通過程式調整，以強調探索或利用的難度。為了實現與政策無關的評估，我們設計了一個度量標準來量化代理行動中的探索和利用錯誤。我們評估了各種前沿 LM 代理，發現即使是最先進的模型在我們的任務上也面臨困難，不同模型表現出不同的失敗模式。我們進一步觀察到，推理模型能更有效地解決任務，並顯示探索和利用都可以通過最小的工程調整顯著改善。我們的代碼可以在 \href{https://github.com/jjj-madison/measurable-explore-exploit}{這裡} 獲得。
2604.13151.author: Jaden Park et.al.
2604.13151.authors: Jaden Park, Jungtaek Kim, Jongwon Jeong, Robert D. Nowak, Kangwook Lee, Yong Jae Lee
